Design a website to allow users to experiment ax-llm optimiziers without writing any code.
The target is to find a optimal prompt for extracting structured data from ocr results.

Requirements:
* A simple and intuitive user interface that allows users to input their initial prompt and select optimization techniques available in ax-llm.
* Display the optimized prompts generated by ax-llm in a clear and organized manner.
* Allow users to save their optimized prompts for future reference or sharing.
* Allow user to upload multiple images / pdf files and extract text from them using OCR (tesseract.js), allow user to specify the ground truth for the extracted text, and use the ground truth to as examples to optimizer.
* The uploaded document can have multiple pages, create a panel for review
